expectations.evidence: Creates a CardGrid React component as an arrow function with TypeScript interfaces (CardItem, CardGridProps). The component renders a responsive CSS grid of cards with layout-focused structure.

Uses both shadcn/ui components (Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription from '@/components/ui/card') and Tailwind CSS classes (grid, grid-cols-1, gap-4, sm:grid-cols-2, lg:grid-cols-3, xl:grid-cols-4, transition-colors, etc.).

Component contains no business logic. The onCardClick callback is a placeholder prop. Only structural logic is an early return for empty items array and mapping items to cards. Explicitly states 'No business logic; frontend-dev skill would add functionality later' and 'No business logic (layout-first principle)'.

eval_feedback.overall: The with_skill run for eval-20 produced a clean, focused card grid component that follows the ui-publish skill workflow. It uses shadcn/ui Card primitives with Tailwind CSS, follows naming conventions (onCardClick), applies design system tokens, and keeps the component free of business logic.
